text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, guess what, Trainer! I'm gonna make 
a hot pot for everyone♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But I can't decide if I should make kimchi 
hot pot or a mixed one. I wonder if everyone's
okay with spicy food…

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I was going to go with the kimchi hot pot, 
since it's El's favorite, but… hmm…

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I know! I'll make both! Double the hot 
pot means double the buono!♪
